Index

A B D N O R S U V 
All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages

A

addObserver(Observer) - Method in class behavioralObserverPattern.Subject
Adds an observer to the list of observers if it is not already subscribed.
addOrder(Order) - Method in class behavioralObserverPattern.OrderHistory
Adds an order to the history.

B

behavioralObserverPattern - package behavioralObserverPattern
Provides classes and interfaces for implementing the Observer design pattern.

D

displayOrderDetails() - Method in class behavioralObserverPattern.Order
Displays the details of the order including the products, their quantities, and the total amount of the order.
displayOrderHistory() - Method in class behavioralObserverPattern.OrderHistory
Displays the history of all placed orders.

N

notifyObservers(String) - Method in class behavioralObserverPattern.Subject
Notifies all subscribed observers about a change in the subject's status.

O

Observer - Interface in behavioralObserverPattern
 
Order - Class in behavioralObserverPattern
Represents an order in the system.
Order(String, List<Product>, List<Integer>, double) - Constructor for class behavioralObserverPattern.Order
Constructs an order with the specified order ID, products, quantities, and total amount.
OrderHistory - Class in behavioralObserverPattern
The OrderHistory class is responsible for managing a collection of past orders.
OrderHistory() - Constructor for class behavioralObserverPattern.OrderHistory
 

R

removeObserver(Observer) - Method in class behavioralObserverPattern.Subject
Removes an observer from the list of observers.

S

Subject - Class in behavioralObserverPattern
The Subject class is an abstract class representing an entity that maintains a list of observers.
Subject() - Constructor for class behavioralObserverPattern.Subject
 

U

update(String) - Method in interface behavioralObserverPattern.Observer
Updates the observer with the new status of the item being tracked.
update(String) - Method in class behavioralObserverPattern.User
This method is called when a Subject updates its status and notifies all observers.
User - Class in behavioralObserverPattern
Represents a user who subscribes to updates from a Subject and gets notified of changes.
User(String) - Constructor for class behavioralObserverPattern.User
Initializes a new user with the specified name.

V

viewOrderDetails() - Method in class behavioralObserverPattern.Order
Views the details of the order, displaying the products and their quantities.
